title: Midlife Menopause & Desire
caption: Are hormonal changes affecting your intimacy?
layout: A two-column compare infographic detailing 'Menopause Effects' on one side and 'Desire Strategies' on the other. Each side lists key points for understanding how menopause affects desire and actionable tips to enhance intimacy.

caption: Is your spark fading after years together?
layout: A cycle diagram illustrating the 'Romance Rekindling Process'. Sections include 'Identify', 'Reconnect', 'Readjust', and 'Reignite', providing actionable steps for each phase.

title: Signs of Healthy vs Toxic Relationships
caption: Do you know the difference between love and toxicity?
layout: A 2x2 grid comparing 'Healthy Traits' vs 'Toxic Traits' with corresponding examples under each. This layout makes it easy to identify red flags in relationships.

title: The 5 Stages of Midlife Transformation

layout: A 4-stage progression infographic, showcasing 'Awakening', 'Exploration', 'Transition', and 'Embodiment'. Each stage details key characteristics and tips on navigating the experience.

title: Intimacy Building Blocks

caption: How do you feel about your body now?
layout: A cycle diagram that highlights 'Acceptance', 'Celebration', 'Understanding', and 'Embracing', focusing on cultivating positive body image in midlife.

title: The Balance of Independence & Togetherness
caption: Are you balancing space and connection in your relationship?
layout: A 2x2 grid illustrating 'Independence' and 'Togetherness' with actionable tips for nurturing both aspects in relationships.

title: The Art of Flirty Conversations
